channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Greta Gerwig’s Upcoming 'Narnia: The Magician's Nephew' to Release Globally in February 2027
item.description: Filmmaker Greta Gerwig is preparing for a major cinematic venture with her adaptation of 'The Magician’s Nephew,' a beloved installment of C.S. Lewis' Chronicles of Narnia. The film is scheduled for a...

item.title: Albanese lifts personal approval as fuel crisis response boosts Labor, while One Nation support stabilises
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has recorded a noticeable improvement in his personal approval ratings, driven largely by public support for the government’s handling of the recent fuel price crisis. ...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli becomes youngest driver to claim three consecutive F1 wins
item.description: On Sunday in Miami, Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli made history as the youngest ever Formula One driver to turn three consecutive pole positions into victories at just 19 years old, joining the ranks ...

item.title: Dimples Romana Celebrates Milestone by Buying Her First Personal Car After 30 Years
item.description: Filipino actress Dimples Romana recently shared her excitement over purchasing her very first personal car, a milestone she achieved after three decades of dedication to her career. In a heartfelt sta...

item.title: Heavy rain, strong winds, and possible snow expected across the Maritimes
item.description: Atlantic Canada is preparing for a stretch of unsettled weather as a storm system moves across the Maritimes, bringing heavy rainfall, strong winds, and the potential for wet snow in some areas. Envir...

item.title: High expectations from Suaalii’s England debut complicate his early rugby union development
item.description: Joseph-Aukuso Suaalii’s recent subdued performance for the Waratahs against the Western Force highlights a broader narrative shaping his early rugby union career. While the Force executed effective ta...

item.title: Yanga and Simba Share Spoils in Exciting 2-2 Kariakoo Derby
item.description: Dar es Salaam witnessed an electrifying Tanzania Mainland Premier League clash on May 3, 2026, as traditional rivals Yanga and Simba played to a 2-2 draw at the Major General Isamuhyo Stadium. Simba c...

item.title: Report Details U.S. Intelligence Activities Targeting the Vatican
item.description: A recent report by investigative journalist Ken Klippenstein claims that the U.S. government has been monitoring the Vatican and Pope Leo XIV through a multi-agency intelligence effort. According to s...

item.title: Australia faces risk of importing Russian crude via Asian fuel imports
item.description: Australia’s growing dependence on fuel from Asia has raised concerns about the indirect import of Russian crude, known as 'blood oil', through third countries. Following the closure of the Strait of H...

item.title: Royal Commission to Examine Anti-Semitism and Security Failures Around Bondi Massacre
item.description: The royal commission into the Bondi massacre of December last year is under scrutiny to ensure it addresses genuine anti-Semitism rather than conflating criticism of Israel with hatred towards Jewish ...

item.title: Trump expresses doubt over Iran's 30-day peace proposal amid ongoing conflict
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed scepticism regarding Iran's most recent peace proposal aimed at ending the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which has now entered its third month. The pro...

item.title: Iran and US Reviewing Peace Proposal, Pakistan Mediates Talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated that his officials are engaging in 'very positive' discussions with Iran, which could lead to beneficial outcomes for both sides. This comes after Iran submitted a 14-...

item.title: Asake Explores Gratitude and Growth in New Album ‘M$NEY’
item.description: Asake don drop him fourth studio album, M$NEY, wey dey explore more than just physical wealth. The album show say money fit mean gratitude, personal growth, peace of mind, and survival. This album mar...

item.title: Jopay reveals the original name of the group SEXBOMB

item.title: Cambridge L.A. Frank’s Store Targeted in Ice Cream Theft
item.description: In Cambridge, Ontario, a local favourite, L.A. Frank’s, recently fell victim to an unusual theft. Over 25 tubs of ice cream were stolen from the store, leaving staff and customers surprised at the aud...

item.title: UP Defends UAAP Season 88 Streetdance Title in Diliman, Adamson Wins High School Division
item.description: The University of the Philippines (UP) Streetdance Club successfully defended their UAAP streetdance championship in the collegiate division during Season 88, held at the Diliman campus. This victory ...

item.title: Sam Kerr becomes Chelsea’s all-time top scorer with memorable goal against Leicester
item.description: Sam Kerr celebrated a milestone in her football career as she became Chelsea’s all-time leading scorer in the Women’s Super League (WSL) with her 64th goal. The goal, a precise header in the 13th minu...

item.title: Cuba’s tourism sector collapses under US oil blockade with only a few visitors remaining
item.description: Cuba’s tourism industry, once a vital source of revenue, has been severely impacted by the ongoing US oil blockade imposed by President Donald Trump. The blockade, aimed at pressuring the communist re...

item.title: Victorian Budget Faces Pressure from Rising Health Costs and Debt Repayments
item.description: Victorian Treasurer Jaclyn Symes is preparing to deliver a pre-election budget that faces significant financial constraints. The state is grappling with rising health expenditure that has yet to retur...

item.title: West Bengal Election Reports No Fatalities, Noted as Most Peaceful in 20 Years
item.description: The recent West Bengal elections have been reported as the most peaceful in the past two decades, marking a significant improvement in electoral conduct. Remarkably, there were zero fatalities reporte...
